Our Mission

Helping Organisations
Access Space,
Reach New Markets.

Whatever you are launching — SatCom, NTN, EO, PNT, or in-orbit services — entering a new country demands commercial, financial, technical, and regulatory expertise working in parallel. We deliver all four from one team, in every major market.

39 Countries 200+ Jurisdictions 150+ Experts 20+ Years

Our Framework — Four Lenses, One Team

E2E Market Access: Four Dimensions,
Delivered Together

Every market entry requires four dimensions to align simultaneously. We do not hand off between disciplines — commercial, financial, technical, and regulatory work runs in parallel under a single engagement model.

🛰️

Commercial

Market Entry & Growth

From market strategy to on-the-ground sales execution, we design and deliver commercial programmes that convert satellite capability into revenue. We work across every market type — emerging, contested, and regulated.

Market strategy & GTM design
Sales enablement & channel build
Public affairs & government relations
Brand, comms & marketing
JV, partnership & distribution models
📡

Regulatory & Legal

Spectrum, Licensing & Compliance

We navigate the world's most complex multi-jurisdiction licensing environments. With expertise across ITU frameworks, national administrations, and spectrum coordination, we turn regulatory complexity into cleared runways.

Multi-jurisdiction licensing & authorisation
Spectrum management & ITU filings
In-country regulatory management
National framework design & advocacy
Compliance monitoring & ongoing management
💼

Financial

Economics & Investment Case

We build the financial architecture that underpins market entry decisions, investment cases, and sovereign negotiations. Our models are designed to withstand institutional scrutiny and inform boardroom decisions.

Business case development
Economic impact analysis
Investment & funding structuring
Commercial modelling & pricing
PPP & sovereign deal structuring
🔧

Technical

Mission Assurance & Viability

From TRL assessment to ground segment integration planning, we provide the independent technical intelligence that investors, regulators, and operators need. We assure missions before they risk capital.

Mission assurance & architecture review
Technical feasibility & TRL assessment
Independent technical due diligence
Ground segment & integration planning
Technology risk & readiness evaluation
Why Access Partnership

Three Reasons Operators Choose AP

When markets are complex and timelines are tight, our clients choose a partner who has done it before — in-country, across every workstream, at once.

01

From First Question to In-Market Operation

We take clients from initial market assessment all the way through licensing, commercial launch, and ongoing compliance — in a single unbroken engagement. No handoffs. No gaps. No starting over with a new advisor at each gate.

02

Genuine In-Country Presence

39 countries. 200+ jurisdictions. Our local teams are not flown-in consultants — they are permanent, in-market specialists with embedded relationships across national regulators, ministries, and commercial partners. That intelligence cannot be replicated from a desk.

03

One Team, Not Four Handoffs

Commercial, regulatory, technical and financial workstreams run in parallel — not sequentially. Our integrated model compresses timelines, eliminates coordination friction, and means every discipline informs the others in real time.

Years of space sector advisory experience

Trusted by leading space organisations globally — from constellation operators and national regulators to sovereign funds and high-growth technology companies spanning every orbit class, every frequency band, and every major market.

Track Record

Proven Across Every Major
Mission Type & Region

Two decades of space market access delivery across every orbit class, every frequency band, and every major market.

Aireon
Aviation · Spectrum · Market Entry
Orchestrated a two-year international campaign across five continents to overcome resistance from monopoly incumbents, safety standards bodies, and civil aviation authorities. Secured regulatory changes that enabled market entry four years ahead of schedule.
$400M+ in revenue generated in a condensed timeframe
Amazon Leo
LEO · Kuiper · Commercial Strategy
Commercial and regulatory advisory supporting Amazon's Project Kuiper market entry across target jurisdictions. Delivered market sizing, regulatory pathway mapping, and stakeholder engagement strategy.
Market entry roadmap delivered across priority jurisdictions
Apple · Globalstar
D2D · SOS · Compliance
Regulatory and commercial advisory for satellite direct-to-device and Emergency SOS service authorisation across complex multi-regulator environments. Delivered licensing submissions and in-country compliance frameworks.
In-country authorisations and compliance frameworks delivered
EchoStar
Policy · Europe · Market Access
Multi-year EU policy roadshow protecting the licensing framework for GEO and HTS satellite services. Engaged DG CONNECT, national regulators, and the European Parliament to preserve satellite spectrum rights.
Hundreds of millions in market value unlocked
Eutelsat
Geopolitical · MENA · Transmission Rights
Navigated geopolitical opposition across the Middle East to protect Eutelsat's orbital slot and transmission rights. Managed in-country government relations and opened new commercial distribution agreements.
Transmission rights maintained; new commercial routes opened
Inmarsat
GEO · L-band · Regulatory Strategy
Regulatory strategy and spectrum management advisory to protect Inmarsat's L-band spectrum position across key jurisdictions. Supported ITU coordination filings, national licensing engagements, and interference resolution.
Spectrum position defended across key global markets
Lynk Global
NTN · D2D · Multi-jurisdiction
End-to-end market access analysis across 20 jurisdictions for Lynk's D2D cell-tower-in-space service. Delivered spectrum availability mapping, regulatory pathway assessments, and licensing strategy for each market.
20 market authorisation reports delivered
SES
Regulatory · Africa · Spectrum
Led a two-year regulatory campaign across African markets and the African Union to protect harmonised C-band spectrum retention. Coordinated 15+ national administrations, built the economic impact case, and managed ITU filing strategy.
$3 billion in infrastructure transition savings secured
Viasat
VHTS · Ka-band · Market Entry
Supported Viasat's market entry strategy for ViaSat-3 across EMEA and APAC. Delivered commercial GTM advisory, regulatory licensing support, and in-country partner identification across priority growth markets.
Multi-region market access strategy delivered
